existing_tokens_summary.design_tokens_ts: Exports colors (background/text/accent/border slate+indigo+violet palette), fonts (body/latin/display/mono), spacing.section, radii (card 0.75rem / modal 1rem / pill), keyframes + tailwindAnimation, framer-motion `animation` presets, and `durations` scale (instant..flip).
existing_tokens_summary.tailwind_config: theme.extend adds custom color namespaces (surface, content, accent, accent-violet, line) sourced from design-tokens, fontFamily aliases, spacing.section, borderRadius.{card,modal,pill}, and registers keyframes + tailwindAnimation. No custom shadows, no custom durations, no custom z-index.

candidates.title: Consolidate placehold.co fallback URLs into a constants module
candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: src/utils/placeholders.ts: export const PLACEHOLDER_NOT_FOUND = (w,h) => `https://placehold.co/${w}x${h}/cccccc/333333?text=Image+Not+Found`; PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT_IMAGE(w,h); PLACEHOLDER_COMING_SOON(w,h). Also a single onImgError handler.
candidates.risk_notes: Pure string substitution; PortfolioCard/PreparingCard have tests asserting the literal URL — update tests to import the constant. Cosmetically identical.

candidates.title: Replace bg-slate-* / border-slate-* / text-slate-* with surface/content/line tokens
candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Use already-defined tokens: bg-slate-200 -> bg-line/bg-surface-border; border-slate-200 -> border-line; text-slate-900 -> text-content; text-slate-700 -> text-content-secondary; text-slate-500 -> text-content-tertiary. For dark surface (bg-slate-900) consider adding `surface-dark` token to design-tokens.ts since slate-900 is already in colors.text.primary but no surface counterpart exists.
candidates.risk_notes: Visual UI; substitutions are intended to be 1:1 but token semantics may differ slightly. PageHeader, TotalSummaryComponent, ProfileSection, PreparingCard, AnswerChecker have tests — many assert classNames containing 'bg-slate-900', so test updates are required (PageHeader.test.tsx already does). Resume page has no tests but is highly visible.

rounded-3xl border border-line bg-surface/80 shadow-sm backdrop-blur

candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Extract into a `<CardShell>` primitive OR a Tailwind plugin utility `card-shell` (rounded-3xl border border-line bg-surface/80 shadow-sm backdrop-blur). Add `card-hover` variant for hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200. Also: standardize on radii.modal (currently rounded-3xl ~ 1.5rem but radii.modal=1rem); consider adding radii.cardLg = 1.5rem.
candidates.risk_notes: Visual surface; correct extraction is 1:1 but introduces a primitive. Some sites add p-6 vs none and my-5 — composition order matters. ProfileSection has tests (ProfileSection covered post Phase 0b) — safe to refactor first.

rounded-xl/2xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-2/2.5 — block variant

candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Extract into local primitives `<ResumePreviewCard>` and `<ResumePreviewBlock>` (the latter for the bg-slate-50 nested variant) inside src/pages/ResumePreviewPage.tsx OR a new src/components/resume/ folder. Already partially flagged by classNames `resume-preview-card` / `resume-preview-block`.
candidates.risk_notes: Print-styled UI; visual regression risk on PDF export. No tests on ResumePreviewPage. Refactor after token-002 to use line/surface tokens consistently.

candidates.title: Repeated AboutMe IntroLine card border+shadow combo + hardcoded translate% magic numbers
candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Add `theme.extend.boxShadow.polaroid = '2px 2px 7px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'` and `polaroid-lg = '7px 7px 7px 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'` in tailwind.config.ts (sourced from design-tokens.ts). Then `shadow-polaroid sm:shadow-polaroid-lg`. Optionally extract a `<PolaroidFrame>` wrapper.
candidates.risk_notes: IntroLine has tests (Phase 0b safe-list). The translate-x/y arbitrary % values are positional, not scale — leave alone (each polaroid has unique placement).

candidates.title: Hardcoded indigo-500 (#6366f1) glow shadows in PortfolioCard — duplicates accent.indigo500 token
candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: rgba(99,102,241,*) is colors.accent.indigo500 with alpha. Add `theme.extend.boxShadow.accent-glow / accent-glow-sm / accent-glow-inset` in tailwind config sourced from design-tokens. The radial gradient is one-off but qualifies for `bg-glass-shine` utility if reused.
candidates.risk_notes: PortfolioCard is in the Phase 0b test safe-list. Tests assert structure, not exact shadow strings — should pass after refactor. Visual sheen on hover is delicate; verify in browser.

candidates.title: Centralize easing constants — PROJECT_CARD_EASE lives in a hook file

occurrences.value: export const PROJECT_CARD_EASE: [number, number, number, number] = [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]

candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Move to src/design-tokens.ts as `easings = { projectCard: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1], toast: [0.68, -0.55, 0.27, 1.55], standard: 'easeOut' }`. Re-export PROJECT_CARD_EASE from the hook for back-compat. ProjectsSection.test mocks it as [0,0,0,0] — keep export name.
candidates.risk_notes: Pure constants relocation; no visual change. Test at src/sections/home/ProjectsSection.test.tsx:172 mocks PROJECT_CARD_EASE — re-exporting preserves the mock surface.

candidates.title: Arbitrary rounded-[Nrem] values that should map to / extend radii scale
candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Extend radii in design-tokens.ts: `cardLg: '1.5rem'`, `cardXl: '2rem'`, `cardHero: '3rem'`, `chipLg: '1.4rem'` (or normalize 1.4/1.5/1.8/28px → cardLg). Map in tailwind borderRadius.
candidates.risk_notes: Visually distinct corner radii are intentional in some places (PortfolioCard hero=3rem); decide which to consolidate. Tests on PortfolioCard/AiDevKitCard/IntroLine assert presence of class strings — update accordingly.

candidates.title: ResumePreviewPage hardcoded background colors (#f7f8fb, #dfe5ec)
candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Add to colors.background in design-tokens.ts: `resumeSheet: '#f7f8fb'`, `resumePage: '#dfe5ec'`, exposed as `bg-surface-resume-sheet` / `bg-surface-resume-page` in tailwind.
candidates.risk_notes: Print/visual surface, no tests; verify on PDF export. Used only twice — borderline whether to tokenize, but #f7f8fb/#dfe5ec are off-palette so they should be named.

candidates.title: min-h-[N] heights that should align to spacing scale or be component constants
candidates.proposed_token_or_constant: Card title clamp heights (3.2/3.3/3.6/3.8rem) in PortfolioCard + PreparingCard + AiDevKitCard should converge — extract as a shared `cardTitleMinHeight` Tailwind utility (e.g. `min-h-card-title sm:min-h-card-title-sm`). FlowDiagram min-h-[132px] is a layout constant — keep but extract as a named const.
candidates.risk_notes: Card title min-heights determine visual rhythm of the projects grid — values diverge slightly across cards which may be a bug; verify intent before consolidating. PortfolioCard, PreparingCard, AiDevKitCard, FlowDiagram all in Phase 0b safe-list.

no_findings_areas: src/design-tokens.ts (source of truth, no hardcoded values to extract)
src/components/AboutMe/MainPhrase1to4.tsx and MainPhrase5to8.tsx (h-[1600vh]/h-[500vh] are scroll-trigger heights, not tokens)
src/components/AboutMe/IntroLine.tsx translate-x/y arbitrary % (positional, intentionally unique per polaroid)
src/sections/home/PostSection.tsx vmin/vw arbitrary positions (responsive layout, not tokens)
